name: Ortto
description: Ortto (formerly Autopilot) — customer journey platform with email, SMS, push, in-app messages, CDP, and analytics for SMB/mid-market.

seo.title: Ortto — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Ortto: Ortto (formerly Autopilot) — customer journey platform with email, SMS, push, in-app messages, CDP, and analytics for SMB/mid-market.

when_to_use: Triggering in-app messages based on CRM journey events
Sending post-purchase email + SMS sequences from one platform
Segmenting push notifications using built-in CDP data
Building user lifecycle journeys with email, push, and in-app

pros: Journey builder is genuinely pleasant to use
Bundled CDP plus analytics avoids tool sprawl
Email, SMS, push, in-app under one roof
Pricing reasonable for SMB and mid-market
cons: Rebrand from Autopilot confused long-time users
Mobile push feels secondary to email workflows
review.verdict: Solid all-in-one for SMBs wanting journeys without stitching ESP, CDP, and push separately.
review.best_for: SMB and mid-market teams consolidating marketing stack under one vendor
review.not_for: Enterprise teams needing best-of-breed depth per channel

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
